final:
module top_module(CLK, D, R, Q);input CLK, D, R;
  output reg Q;  // Changed to 'reg' to hold the latch state

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge R or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (R) begin
      Q <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;  // Directly assign D to Q
    end
  end

endmodule
